[Home](https://www.enventure.com/) [About Us](https://www.enventure.com/about-us/) Careers

# Careers

Can you picture yourself as part of an energetic group of young professionals
who are committed to excellence?
Do you have what it takes to be part of a winning team that is great at what it does and has a passion for
producing top quality work? If your answer is Yes, then you’re on the right page!

![energetic group](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/career.jpg)

### @ Enventure

The Enventure family has over 240 members, based out of India. Enventure is a performance-driven organization where each individual is encouraged to be proactive. Outstanding contributions are recognized and performers are rewarded.

We work hard. We enjoy what we do. We celebrate our wins. We learn from constructive criticism. We keep our customers happy. We encourage our employees to innovate and contribute at all levels to keep the Enventure flag flying high.

### Our Core Values

- Fairness
- Respect for Individual
- Pride in Work
- Efficiency
- Prudence

### Why work at Enventure ?

A career at Enventure can be challenging as well as rewarding. We provide all employees the
opportunity to build a great career where they develop their skills, capabilities and knowledge and be part
of a team that accepts nothing less than the best.

## Current Job Openings

- All
- Building Engineering
- Plant Engineering
- Support

- Nothing Found
- ### Procurement Engineer



BE/B. Tech in Mechanical engineering



**Experience** 6+ Years





The Roles & Responsibilities:


1 Identifying potential suppliers and vendors.



2 Placing orders and managing procurement processes.



3 Ensuring materials meet required specifications



4 Identification of all requirementsin requisition for purchaseissued by Design Department.



5 Maintain the BOQ with updates from suppliers until after awarding the contract.



6 Establish delivery terms, time and stages of inspection for the supply with ProjectManagement Team



7 Ensure that all potential suppliers are provided with identical information



8 Arrangeand participate inmeetings between suppliers and Company engineers and other personnel to facilitate standardization and economical procurement.



9 Identifying the best event in the correct order for project to finish on time & on budget.



Core Skills:


1ERP System



2 Aconex



3 Procore



4 SharePoint



5 Power BI



6 Tableau



Soft Skills:


1 Experience in an engineering, procurement and operations



2 Ability to analyze bills of material and drawings to understand key requirements



3 Establish supplier quality, delivery, lead-time



4 Strong communication skills



5 Strong Analytical & problem-solving skills & meticulous



6 Strong communication skills



Employment Type :


Permanent job, Full time



Industry :


Oil & Gas



Location :


Kochi



[Read More](https://www.enventure.com/about-us/careers/procurement-engineer/)

- ### Document Controller



Bachelor’s Degree



**Experience** 6+ Years





The Roles & Responsibilities:


1 Manage and maintain all controlled company documents, ensuring they are updated and accessible.



2 Create and manage document hierarchy and process systems, including identification, classification, and filing of documents.



3 Conduct regular document audits to confirm that documents are current and accurately reflect recorded evidence, ensuring compliance



4 Work closely with various departments to facilitate the document control process and ensure effective communication during external audits.



5 Train employees on records management procedures, including documentation, retention, retrieval, destruction, and disaster recovery.



6 Assist with file migrations, audits, and perform administrative tasks as needed, including preparing correspondence and reports.



7 Familiarity in project management documentation processes.



8 Proficiency in document management software



Core Skills:


1 Aconex



2 SharePoint



3 Electronic Document Management Systems (EDMS)



4 Advanced Excel, VBA, Macros, Reporting Excel Tools



5 SAP – used for Invoice generation



6 MS Project



Soft Skills:


1 Optimize Metadata



2 Regular Audits & clean ups



3 Data Entry Skill



4 Strong communication skills



5 Quality control



6 Famility with inter disciple documents



7 Report Extraction on regular basis



Employment Type


Permanent job, Full time



Industry


Oil & Gas



Location


Kochi, Shivamogga, Mysore, Bangalore



[Read More](https://www.enventure.com/about-us/careers/document-controller/)

- ### Project Manager (Primavera)



BE/B. Tech



**Experience** 6+ Years





The Roles & Responsibilities:


1\. Project Manager expertise in Building / Plant engineering service



2\. Develop comprehensive project plans that outline objectives, timelines, milestones, and resource requirements.



3\. Create detailed schedules using project management tools, ensuring efficient resource allocation.



4\. Oversee project budgets, track expenses, and implement cost control measures to ensure projects remain within financial constraints.



5\. Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, contractors, regulatory bodies & stakeholders.



6\. Communicate project progress, challenges, and changes to all stakeholders regularly



7\. Manage project budgets, Procurement plans and resource allocation.



8\. Conduct regular risk assessments and develop mitigation strategies to address them proactively.



9\. Ensure Quality, Compliance and Regulatory Requirements



10\. Implement quality control procedures and conduct inspections throughout the project lifecycle.



11\. Lead and mentor project teams, fostering a culture of collaboration, accountability, and continuous improvement.



12\. Conduct performance evaluations and provide coaching to team members.



13\. Maintain accurate project documentation, including contracts, reports, and meeting minutes.



14\. Prepare Project Reports and Progress Updates



Core Skills:


1 MS Projects



2 AutoCAD



3 Navisworks



4 Primavera



Soft Skills:


1 Strong communication skills



2 US Codes and Standards



3 MEP knowledge



4 Project Management



5 Problem solving



Employment Type :


Permanent job, Full time



Industry :


Oil & Gas



Location :


Kochi



[Read More](https://www.enventure.com/about-us/careers/project-manager-primavera/)

- ### Discipline Lead(Piping)



BE/B. Tech in Mechanical engineering



**Experience** 15+ Years





Roles & Responsibilities:


1 Sr. Designer is responsible for quality of 2D Drawings/ 3D model and quality of all model based deliverables like Isometrics, GAD s, Civil & Mech information drawings, supporting and support sketches



2 Should guide juniors and coordinate with AE for individual areas and sort out all technical problems of area.



3 Should be able to explain / participate in plot plan meetings with internal / external customers.



4 Shall understand in depth P&ID requirements and should be able to design piping network to take care of the same in the piping design.



5 Shall be able to read vendor drawings and shall be able to provide comments to suit piping design needs.



6 Able to prepare nozzle orientation drawing, support clips, GA, Plot Plans. Should understand usage of Check Lists.



7 Should be able to participate in 3D Model reviews.



8 Verify correct routing, support details, pipe spacing, and equipment clearances



9 Strong knowledge of P&IDs, piping layouts, isometrics, and material take-offs



10 Ensure that piping designs comply with project specifications, codes (ASME, ANSI, etc.), and safety standards



Core Skills:


1 AutoCAD Plant 3D



2 AutoCAD



3 Navisworks



4 CADWorx



Soft Skills:


1 Strong communication skills



2 Plant layout, Equipment layout



3 Isometrics checking



4 Piping Material Specification



5 Problem solving



Employment Type


Permanent job, Full time



Industry


Oil & Gas



Location


Bangalore, Kochi



[Read More](https://www.enventure.com/about-us/careers/discipline-leadpiping/)

- ### Discipline Lead – HVAC



Mechanical Engineering



**Experience** Minimum 8 Years experience on US projects and applicable Basic on ASHRAE Codes & IMC





The Role and Responsibilities:


1 Project, Team and Client management. Experience on drawing preparation which includes Duct/Pipe sizing and modelling, schematics/control diagrams and schedules. Concept design and equipment selection. Basic sheet setup experience will be an added advantage.



2 Experience to carry out calculations like Ventilation, Heat load, Unit static, Pump Head, Expansion Tank sizing, Stair pressurization, Submittal review, RFI response.



3 Experience on modelling/drafting, Clash coordination, fabrication modelling, shop drawings, & spooling.



4 Ensure deliverables meet requirements by clarifying quality and accurate output. To follow internal quality processes.



5 Escalate issues (if any) to the Reporting Manager for the corrective and containment actions to be initiated on time.



6 Should have experience of healthcare, Residential and Commercial Projects.



7 Following Enventure processes and ensure the team is adhering to the same.



8 Involve in the Sales Process, by participating in Solutioning Calls and preparing Time Estimates.



9 On time Delivery & project tracker



10 Staff the Team with competent resources, promote a performance-driven culture among the Team by setting Goals, assessing performance, and providing constructive feedback.



Core Skills:


1 Project Management



2 US projects



3 Revit MEP/Navisworks Manage



4 BIM360 & LOD 350.



5 HAP/Trace3D/IES



Soft Skills:


1 Project Management



2 Communication Skills – Verbal & Written



3 Team Management



4 Problem Solving



5 Interpersonal skills



6 Client Management



Employment Type


Permanent job, Full time



Industry


Construction and design



Location


Kochi



[Read More](https://www.enventure.com/about-us/careers/discipline-lead-hvac/)

- ### Senior Structural (Autodesk Revit)



Civil Engineering



**Experience** 5+ years





Roles and Responsibilities


1 Proficiency in BIM software such as Revit, AutoCAD, Navisworks, etc.



2 Developing and managing digital models of building structures using BIM software.



3 Conducting clash detection analysis to identify and resolve any issues between different building systems.



4 Excellent communication and collaboration skills.



5 Coordinating with all other Disciplines.



6 Conduct regular BIM audits and quality control checks to ensure model accuracy and compliance



7 Facilitate BIM training and professional development for personnel.



8 Ensure that BIM deliverables are completed on time and meet project specifications and standards

- ### Executive



Graduate / Equivallent



**Experience** 5 Years





Roles & Responsibilities


Oversee day-to-day administrative activities and ensure a safe, clean, and efficient office environment.



Monitor office supplies, stationery, and equipment; ensure timely procurement and maintenance.



Coordinate with facility management for repair, maintenance, and security services.



Maintain and update administrative records, files, and reports.



Manage front office operations, courier services, housekeeping, pantry, and vendor coordination.



Manage end-to-end domestic and international travel arrangements (flight, train, hotel, cabs, visa, insurance).



Prepare travel itineraries and share details with employees and ensure compliance with travel policy and maintain accurate travel.



Liaise with travel agencies, hotels, and transport vendors for best rates and service quality.



Coordinate travel bookings as per company policies and budget approvals.



Core Skills


Proficient in MS Office (Word, Excel, Outlook)



Soft Skills


Strong communication and interpersonal skills.



Knowledge of travel booking tools



visa processing, and expense management



Employment Type


Permanent job, Full time



Location


Kochi

- ### Engineer (Piping)



BE/B. Tech in Mechanical engineering



**Experience** 5+ Years





Roles & Responsibilities


1 Should be well-versed in AutoCAD Plant 3D P&IDs as well as intelligent P&IDs in accordance with process guidelines.



2 Able to create Piping material specification in AutoCAD Plant 3D as per P&IDs



3 Should posses sound knowledge on equipment layout, piping layout, piping GAD and orthogenrations.



4 Should be able to create or edit isometrics templates / border / scale / report format / drafting standards.



5 Should be able to create Equipment models in AutoCAD Plant 3D as per Vendor Drawing.



6 Able to create Tie-in List / Tie in sketch



7 Able to do the piping routing in AutoCAD Plant 3D independently.



8 Should be able to generate the stress isos, coordinate with pipe stress department and revise the 3D model as required.



9 Possess thorough knowledge on pipe support standards for critical and non critical lines.



10 Able to perform Initial clash check and 3D model review as per detail phase requirements



11 Should be able to lead the 30%, 60% and 90% model reivew with customer.



12 Should be able extract isometrics and review them as per the checklists following company’s standard review process.



13 Should be able to extract MTO report from Plant 3D and review.



Core Skills


1 AutoCAD Plant 3D



2 AutoCAD



3 Navisworks



4 CADWorx



Soft Skills


1 Strong communication skills



2 Plant layout, Equipment layout



3 Isometrics extraction



4 Spec edit



5 Problem solving



Employment Type


Permanent job, Full time



Industry


Oil & Gas



Location


Kochi



[Read More](https://www.enventure.com/about-us/careers/engineer-pipe-stress-3/)

- ### Discipline Lead (Electrical)



B. E./ B.tech in Electrical Engineering



**Experience** 12 Years





Roles & Responsibilities






01 Minimum of 12 years of experience in Electrical Engineering, with a focus on design and project progress tracking and coordination. Bachelor’s degree in electrical engineering from an accredited institution.



02 Proven experience in designing electrical systems across multiple sectors, with expertise in at least one of the following: data centers, residential, commercial, healthcare, educational institutions.



03 Familiarity with electrical codes and standards such as NEC, NFPA, and other relevant industry standards.



04 Proficient in Revit, Naviswork, Evolve, and other electrical design software.



05 Ability to understand and meet client needs, ensuring that electrical designs align with project objectives.



06 Proficient in creating detailed models and drawings of electrical services in Revit, including lighting, power, earthing, and lightning protection systems. Skilled in preparing schematics, schedules, and detailed construction documents.



07 Experienced in developing 3D models of data centers in Revit and generating accurate 2D drawings. Capable of performing basic electrical design calculations to ensure compliance and performance.



08 Competent in modeling underground and overhead electrical elements in Revit with a strong understanding of constructability and site-specific constraints.



09 Skilled in modeling underground duct banks and effectively coordinating with stormwater, sanitary, and water services to avoid clashes and ensure seamless integration.



10 Knowledgeable in conduit spooling and capable of preparing detailed spool sheets to facilitate accurate prefabrication and installation.



11 Ability to perform quality checks as per client standards.



12 Ability to collaborate effectively in cross-functional teams and manage communication with internal team members.



13 Provide regular project updates and reports to reporting manager, ensuring clear communication of project status and any challenges



14 Identify potential design or construction risks early on and work proactively to mitigate delays or complications.



15 Follow quality control measures to ensure high standards in all deliverables.



16 Support the professional development of reportees and junior engineers and trainees by providing mentorship, technical guidance, and feedback.



17 Manage a team of 15 Engineers



18 Follow all organizational process



Core Skills






01 Electrical System Expertise



02 US Project codes and standards



03 Revit Software



04 Naviswork



05 BIM360



06 Evolve



07 Dialux, Visual



08 AutoCAD



09 Project Management & Coordination



Soft Skills


01 Team Collaboration



02 Time & Client Management



03 Problem-Solving



04 Communication



05 Adaptability and Flexibility



06 Conducting Technical Training



07 Meeting Timelines



08 Result Orientation



09 Responsiveness



10 Reliability



11 Accuracy



Employment Type


Permanent job, Full time



Industry


Construction and design



Location


Kochi



[Read More](https://www.enventure.com/about-us/careers/discipline-lead-electrical/)

- ### Engineer (Structural – RISA)



B.E/ B.Tech - Civil



**Experience** 8+ Years





The Roles & Responsibilities


1. Experienced Structural engineer in Oil and gas refineries, Petrochemical plant and power

     plants.

2. Structural Steel design of pipe racks, pipe bridges, miscellaneous pipe supports, equipment

     supporting structures and access platforms, and its foundation design (Shallow & Pile)

3. Design foundations for vertical and horizontal vessels and Pit design and Structural skid

     design.

4. Candidate should be well versed with American codes (AISC, ACI, ASCE) and PIP standards.
5. Should have knowledge of connection design including anchor bolts and base plates design.


Soft Skills


1. Strong Communication Skill
2. Problem-solving and Goal-oriented
3. Teamwork
4. Works well under pressure


Core Skills


1\. RISA 3D & RISA Foundation

2\. NAVIS WORK

3\. RISA CONNECTION

4\. STAAD PRO

5\. MICROSOFT OFFICE

6\. BLUEBEAM REVU


Employment Type


Permanent job, Full time


Industry


Oil & Gas (RCC, Steel Structure and Foundation)


Location


Kochi

[Read More](https://www.enventure.com/about-us/careers/engineer-structural-risa/)

- ### Architect



B. Arch. / M. Arch/Diploma Arch



**Experience** 2-5 years





Roles & Responsibilities


1 Create and manage 3D models using software like Revit or similar tools.



2 Maintain accuracy, consistency, and quality in models throughout the project.



3 Use BIM tools for design iteration, analysis, and visualization of architectural concepts.



4 Support design teams with high-quality presentations, 3D renderings.



5 Coordinate multidisciplinary models, identify clashes, and resolve conflicts using clash detection tools like Navisworks.



6 Generate detailed construction documents, including plans, sections, and elevations, directly from BIM models.



7 Ensure the accuracy of data integrated within the BIM models (e.g., schedules, material lists, and specifications).



8 Manage revisions and updates to the model throughout project phases.



Core Skills


01 Design Basics / 3D coordination



02 Revit



03 AutoCAD



04 Project Coordination



05 Scheduling & Planning



Soft Skills


01 Client Management



02 Team Collaboration



03 Communication



04 Problem-Solving



05 Adaptability and Flexibility



Employment Type


Permanent job, Full time



Industry


Construction and design



Location


Kochi



[Read More](https://www.enventure.com/about-us/careers/architect/)

- ### Senior-Architect



B.Arch/Diploma Arch



**Experience** 5-8 years





Roles & Responsibilities


1 Conduct regular quality checks for all drawing submission sets and provide mark-ups.



2 Use BIM tools for design iteration, analysis, and visualization of architectural concepts.



3 Lead and mentor junior architects, designers, and interns. This includes overseeing their work, providing feedback, and helping them grow professionally.



4 Coordinate multidisciplinary models, identify clashes, and resolve conflicts using clash detection tools like Navisworks.



5 Prepare and maintain comprehensive project documentation, including design drawings, specifications, and progress reports.



6 Ensure the accuracy of data integrated within the BIM models (e.g., schedules, material lists, and specifications).



7 Manage revisions and updates to the model throughout project phases.



8 Provide solutions for complex design challenges, often working with clients to resolve issues.



9 Ensure team members adhere to project standards, quality control measures, and deadlines.



Core Skills


01 Design Basics / 3D coordination



02 Revit



03 AutoCAD



04 Project Coordination



05 Scheduling & Planning



06 Quality Assurance and Compliance



Soft Skills


01 Client Management



02 Team Collaboration



03 Communication



04 Problem-Solving



05 Adaptability and Flexibility



06 Leadership



Employment Type


Permanent job, Full time



Industry


Construction, Design



Location


Kochi



[Read More](https://www.enventure.com/about-us/careers/senior-architect/)

- ### Senior Electrical Engineer



BE/B.Tech (Electrical)



**Experience** 5 - 8 years





Software Skills:


Revit



Electrical Design



US projects exposure



Job Description:


US projects work experience



Aware of Medium Voltage and Low Voltage Power distribution and planning



Aware of Street Lighting and Telecom network design



Aware of Low current design like MA TV, CCTV, Public address, Data network Fire Alarm



Aware of using Dialux software for outdoor street lighting calculation



Aware of Pump Stations Electrical design works



Able to independently work on project deliverables from the base design stage to detailed designs



Working knowledge of software Revit AUTO CAD, Dialux, Navisworks, SKM power tool software, MS office Mandatory



Knowledge of IEC/IEEE Standards



Employment Type:


Permanent job, Full time



Industry:


Construction, Design



Location


Kochi



[Read More](https://www.enventure.com/about-us/careers/senior-electrical-engineer-2/)

- ### Senior Engineer (Piping)



BE/BTech (Mechanical)



**Experience** 4-6 years





Software Skills:


CADWORX



Job Description:


Piping Design Engineering in Petrochemical, Refinery & Biogas, Oil & Gas Sector, WTP, Bio process plant projects with proficiency in 2D & 3D Modelling and Detail engineering.



Hands-on experience in tools like CADWorx used to create 3D Piping Modelling, Equipment Modelling, Piping GA, Iso extraction and Reviews.



Ability to understand piping codes and standards. Checking project scope of work for all engineering activities



Study of technical document and understanding the scope of work



Pipe planning as per FEED documents and Scope of work



Planning and Routing of pipe as per P&ID in 3D Modelling Environment



Knowledge of administrative work related to software such as CADWorx



Knowledge of Detail engineering activities such as Equipment & Piping layout, Piping isometrics and Material Take-off



Familiarity with international design codes and standard (ASME, API, ASTM, ANSI)



Knowledge of Primary & secondary supports and support detailed drawing



Study of PFD, P&ID, Plot plan, Instrument Hook-up drawings, civil drawings & various layout drawings



Familiar with interference checking of overall plant model in Navisworks



Attend the internal review activities and inter-discipline check meetings. Provides technical  support to Team



Prepare project estimate for the piping effort



Work jointly with Project Engineer and Engineering team



Employment Type:


Permanent job, Full time



Industry:


Oil & Energy, Mechanical or Industrial Engineering



Location


Kochi



[Read More](https://www.enventure.com/about-us/careers/senior-engineer-piping/)

- ### Senior HVAC Designer



BE/BTech (Mechanical)



**Experience** 5 - 8 years





Software Skills:


Revit



Heat Load Calculations



HVAC Design



US Project experience



Job Description:


Perform heat load & Cooling Load calculations using either Carrier HAP or Trane Trace 700



Implementation of ASHRAE codes & Middle East Codes



Extracting information from drawings & ability to create – Zoning



Conducting detailed analysis of high-efficiency HVAC equipment, motors, controls, lighting systems, and other equipment to determine electric and natural gas energy savings compared to baseline equipment and or building codes



Equipment Selection



External Static Pressure Calculation, Stair Case and Lift well Pressurization Calculation.



Preparation of BOQ



Employment Type:


Permanent job, Full time



Industry:


Construction, Design



Location


Kochi



[Read More](https://www.enventure.com/about-us/careers/bim-hvac-designer/)

- ### Engineer-Electrical



BE/BTech/Diploma (Electrical)



**Experience** 2 - 5 years





Software Skills:


Revit



Modeler / Design



Job Description:


  - Developing one-line diagrams, electrical and lighting plans, P&ID drawings, and automation network drawing
  - Specify and evaluate supplier components, subsystems, and services
  - Collaborate and Coordinate with other disciplines by BIM coordination meeting attendance
  - Navigate and evaluate construction documents, equipment cut sheets, and schematic diagrams from all disciplines, to identify the electrical scope of work and how the installations of other disciplines will affect the electrical installation


Employment Type:


Permanent job, Full time


Industry:


Construction. Design


Location


Kochi
